  • Uses of UncollatedReferenceQualifier in de.uka.ilkd.key.java

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java with parameters of type UncollatedReferenceQualifier
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProgramElement
    Recoder2KeYConverter.convert(UncollatedReferenceQualifier urq)
    if an UncollatedReferenceQualifier appears throw a ConvertExceception because these qualifiers have to be resolved by running the CrossReferencer

  • Uses of UncollatedReferenceQualifier in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Reference
    SchemaCrossReferenceSourceInfo.resolveURQ(UncollatedReferenceQualifier urq)
    does not resolve the urq, just returns the argument

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(ReferencePrefix child, UncollatedReferenceQualifier parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(ReferencePrefix child, UncollatedReferenceQualifier parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
